name: Strawberry Cheesecake Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package Fat-free cream cheese (8 Oz), softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. To prepare crust, prepare a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray and flour. Place flour in a bowl and drizzle with oil. Use a pastry blender to evenly distribute the oil and produce a mixture the consistency of coarse cornmeal. Sprinkle on the water, 1 tablespoon at a time, and continue mixing until you can gather the dough into a ball.
3. Roll the dough into an 11-inch circle onto a floured surface. Patch any cracks that may form, but otherwise try not to handle the dough more than necessary. Transfer the dough to prepared pie pan. Trim the dough, leaving a 1-inch overhang. Crimp the overhanging dough into a decorative edge.
4. Chill the crust for 20 minutes.
5. To prepare filling, in a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, 1/2 cup sugar, lemon peel, and juice until creamy. Spread mixture into pie shell and top with fresh strawberries.
6. In a saucepan, cook frozen strawberries, remaining sugar, and cornstarch until bubbly, then cook for two minutes more. Cool completely; pour over strawberries in pie shell.
7. Chill.
